name: DaCheng HS S & M Index(QDII-LOF)
summary: DaCheng HS S & M Index(QDII-LOF) is a fund that invests in the Hong Kong stock market, specifically targeting small and medium-sized companies listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. As a QDII-LOF, it allows domestic Chinese investors to access overseas markets. It is managed by Dacheng Fund Management Co., Ltd., a Chinese asset management firm.
